title: AlwaysDaytime
description: Always make your worlds be at Daytime!
body:
![day2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e22257c5bbc27578ba938426f0c9e16fcb74c18.png)

# 🌞 AlwaysDay  
Keep your Minecraft world in **permanent daylight** with clear skies!  

Tired of the endless cycle of night, mobs spawning, and rainy weather?  
**AlwaysDay** is a lightweight plugin that locks your server to bright, sunny daytime — forever.  

---

## ✨ Features
- 🌅 Keeps the world locked to **daytime** (time set to morning).  
- ☀️ Automatically clears **rain** and **thunderstorms**.  
- ⚡ Runs every few seconds in the background — no commands needed.  
- 🪶 Extremely **lightweight**: near-zero performance impact.  
- 🧩 Works on **Spigot, Paper, and Folia**.  
- 📜 Supports **Minecraft 1.8 → 1.21.8+**.  

---

## 🔧 Installation
1. Download the `.jar` file.  
2. Drop it into your server’s `/plugins` folder.  
3. Restart your server.  
4. Enjoy eternal daylight!  

---

## 💡 Use Cases
- **Creative servers** – build without worrying about nightfall.  
- **Showcase maps** – always present your builds in perfect lighting.  
- **Minigames / hubs** – keep the vibe bright and cheerful.  

---

## ✅ Compatibility
- Platforms: Spigot, Paper, Purpur, Folia  
- Versions: **1.8 → latest**
